name: Vidalia Onion and Cucumber Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 small Vidalia onion, cut into semi-circles
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread the onion out on a serving salad platter and top with cucumber slices.
2. Sprinkle with cheese, followed by chervil.
3. In a cup, stir together oil, vinegar and salt and pepper to taste.
4. Pour over the salad. Makes 2 servings.
